name: @types/proper-lockfile
usage_summary: proper-lockfile is imported directly in packages/app/src/cli/services/build/extension.ts and its test file. proper-lockfile@4.1.2 does not ship its own .d.ts files, so @types/proper-lockfile (pinned to 4.1.4 in app devDependencies) provides the necessary type declarations.
how_to_remove: Not a removal candidate while proper-lockfile is in use. If proper-lockfile is replaced (e.g. with a package that bundles types), remove @types/proper-lockfile from app devDependencies simultaneously.
replacement_reason: proper-lockfile is actively used in the app package build service and does not bundle its own types. The @types package had 0 releases in the last 24 months (stable/complete), but must be retained.
